title: AddaRank
description: A clean, powerful, and fully GUI-based rank management plugin with custom ranks, player head selection, and stunning rank animations
body:
# AddaRank
AddaRank is a clean, powerful, and fully GUI-based rank management plugin designed for servers that want a simple yet visually stunning ranking system.
Unlike traditional permission plugins, AddaRank focuses on ease of use, smooth rank assignment, and a premium player experience — without unnecessary complexity.
✨ Features
✔ Fully GUI-based rank management
✔ Custom rank creation
✔ Unique rank color themes
✔ Online player head selection
✔ Large rank achievement animation
✔ Safe rank deletion system
✔ Lightweight & optimized
⚙️ Commands
/rank add
Create custom ranks easily.
• Custom rank names
• Custom colors
• Instant setup
/ropen
Opens the Rank Selection GUI.
The GUI can display predefined or custom ranks such as:
Owner
Admin
Mod
Dev
Helper
Member
VIP
Elite
Supreme
King
Legend
Each rank includes a unique visual style for a premium appearance.
Permission: Admin Only
🖥️ GUI-Based Rank Assignment
Selecting a rank opens a second GUI showing:
✔ All online players
✔ Live player heads
Simply click a player’s head →
✅ Rank is assigned instantly.
No typing. No hassle.
🌈 Rank Achievement Animation
When a player receives a rank, a large animated message appears:
YOU ACHIEVED [RANK]!
✔ Huge screen display
✔ Eye-catching effect
✔ Premium celebration feel
Ranks feel rewarding and exciting.
🗑️ /rank delete
Delete ranks safely using a confirmation GUI.
✔ Select rank
✔ Confirm / Cancel interface
✔ Prevents accidental deletions
🎯 Why AddaRank?
AddaRank is perfect for server owners who want:
✔ Simple rank management
✔ Beautiful GUI interactions
✔ Clean & modern visuals
✔ Smooth player experience
Ideal for:
• Survival Servers
• Lifesteal Servers
• PvP Networks
• Economy Servers
💡 Design Philosophy
AddaRank keeps rank management:
✔ Fast
✔ Clean
✔ User-friendly
✔ Visually appealing
Because ranks should feel rewarding — not boring.
